## Description

Brief description of the changes in this PR.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Content addition (new lesson, module, or exercise)
- [ ] Content fix (typo, correction, or clarity improvement)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Related Issues

Closes #

## Checklist

### For Code Changes
- [ ] I have run `pnpm lint` and there are no errors
- [ ] I have run `pnpm type-check` and there are no errors
- [ ] I have run `pnpm build` and the build succeeds
- [ ] I have added tests for my changes (if applicable)
- [ ] I have updated documentation (if applicable)

### For Content Changes
- [ ] I have tested all commands and code snippets
- [ ] I have checked for typos and grammatical errors
- [ ] I have followed the content style guide
- [ ] I have included hands-on exercises where appropriate
- [ ] Links and references are valid

Add screenshots to demonstrate visual changes.

Any additional context or notes for reviewers.
